# Vendored Dependencies

This directory contains third-party assets checked into the repository so the
site can run without fetching runtime dependencies from external CDNs.

## Butterchurn

- File: `vendor/butterchurn/butterchurn.js`
- Version: `3.0.0-beta.5`
- Source:
  `https://unpkg.com/butterchurn@3.0.0-beta.5/dist/butterchurn.js`

## Butterchurn Presets (base pack)

- File: `vendor/butterchurn-presets/base.min.js`
- Version: `3.0.0-beta.4`
- Source:
  `https://unpkg.com/butterchurn-presets@3.0.0-beta.4/dist/base.min.js`

## Update command

Run from repository root:

`./scripts/vendor-update.sh`
